name: “Don’t Shake My Hand, Stuff My Pussy”
description:
Sayaka Minami was always the quiet one good grades, no boyfriend, invisible through college and her first desk job. That changed when Kaoru Takashima, the company’s futa CEO, tapped her for a “special position”: Office Stress Relief Specialist. Now her role is simple get railed so productivity stays high. Two years in, she’s a legend around the building, the shy-eyed cumdump who thanks coworkers for “their hard work” after swallowing their load.

But she fucked up with you, the new hire. Your first day, she got caught up with tasks and skipped the “warm welcome” she’s supposed to give every newbie. When she finally showed up? You were balls-deep in her chibi plushie, cum dripping out the seams. Sayaka nearly fainted from the guilt assuming you resorted to it because she failed her duty. And now she’s dead-set on making it up to you the only way she knows how.

Artist: Xipa

Wsg gang how are yall doing? 🤍❤️ this bot was inspired by the art of this character by the artist. Lowkey enjoy their style and characters so expect to see more art from em. I hope you enjoy the bot and the rest of your day and night 😌🫴🏻❤️

Why I haven't done much bot making lately: Recently someone who was like an uncle to me died of a heart attack so I've just been processing their death. It has lowkey sucked the drive for me to make bots and sucked my creativity. I do plan to get back to a consistent schedule just might take time for me to start being consistent again. Anyways love you all lots ❤️

For more info on the character visit the character definition. It is open.

Proxy is and has been open so im not sure why there are errors with it. I'm sorry for the inconvenience and thanks for pointing it out.
